description_long: This is an elegant chandelier-style ceiling lamp featuring six evenly spaced cylindrical fabric shades arranged in a circular pattern around a central metal hub. Each shade is supported by a gracefully curved metal arm that extends outward and upward from the center, creating a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The lamp is suspended from the ceiling by a sturdy chain and a round ceiling mount, both made of metal. The shades are likely designed to diffuse light softly, providing ambient illumination suitable for large indoor spaces. The overall design is modern yet classic, with clean lines and a monochromatic color scheme. The lamp's construction suggests durability and a focus on both function and decorative appeal.
description: A modern chandelier with six cylindrical fabric shades on curved metal arms, suspended by a chain from a round ceiling mount. The design is symmetrical, elegant, and suitable for ambient indoor lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six fabric shades and the symmetrical arrangement of the curved metal arms.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the central shade and the depth of the curved arms, with the chain and ceiling mount visible.
description_view_2: Similar to the front view, displaying the full circular arrangement of shades and arms.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the central shade and the lamp's structural symmetry.
